chunks.text: Yongdong Wang named Global Senior Vice President at Microsoft - EECS at Berkeley Alumnus Yongdong Wang (CS Ph.D. ’92), currently Chief Technology Officer of Microsoft Asia-Pacific R&D Group, has been named Microsoft’s Global Senior Vice President. Wang joined Microsoft in 2009, founding the Microsoft Asia-Pacific R&D Group in Beijing, and took on the additional role of managing director of Applications & Services Group East Asia. Categories Alumni Industry View Open Faculty Positions
